[@microsoft/fast-element/hydration.js](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [HydrationMismatchExpectation](../fast-element.hydrationmismatchexpectation/index.html)

## HydrationMismatchExpectation interface

Structured description of the binding hydration was expecting to apply when a mismatch is detected.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface HydrationMismatchExpectation
```

</td><td>

string


</td><td>

Human-readable description of the binding aspect, for example `"content"`<!-- -->, `"property className"`<!-- -->, or `"attribute aria-label"`<!-- -->.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[tagName](../fast-element.hydrationmismatchexpectation.tagname/)


</td><td>


</td><td>

string \| null


</td><td>

The tag name of the element the binding was expecting (e.g. `"SPAN"`<!-- -->), or `null` when the binding does not target a specific element (host or template-level bindings).


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
